prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约4022名、6598名、6878名、5855名、6441名，整体呈后移趋势，2022年跳升后近3年在5855–6878区间波动，2025年基准约6441名；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年77人、2022年198人、2023年195人、2024年183人、2025年213人；2026年计划270人，较2025年扩招约26.8%，扩招幅度较大，竞争有所缓解但位次后移压力仍存。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第20名，近年排名稳定在第20–22名区间，属全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及PPT专业贬低争议及考试作弊管理质疑，但整体影响有限；抖音热度排名第66位（一般），未见明显报考热度异常信号；无历史投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估A-及以上达20个学科，其中化学工程与技术、管理科学与工程为A+，光学工程、仪器科学与技术、动力工程及工程热物理、土木工程、城乡规划学、建筑学、机械工程、水利工程等为A，工科实力极为突出，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，与天大优势工科高度匹配；河南省2026年考生总数约120万人（不确定），按历史比例估算物理类约72万人，较2025年物理类55.5万人大幅增加约30%，竞争加剧；天津大学位于天津市，非本省高校；2025年在河南省招生占比约16.4%（98人/全国598人），河南为该校重要生源省份之一，招生规模较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招26.8%及河南省物理类考生大幅增加约30%等因素，考虑考生数大增带来的竞争加剧做小幅上调；预测最低位次约7525名，区间7025–8025名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 4022, 6598, 6878, 5855, and 6441 respectively, showing an overall backward trend. After a jump in 2022, the rankings fluctuated within the 5855–6878 range in the past three years, with a baseline of about 6441 in 2025. The enrollment plan for science/physics category in Henan Province: 77 in 2021, 198 in 2022, 195 in 2023, 183 in 2024, and 213 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 270, an increase of about 26.8% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion, easing competition but still facing pressure from the backward trend in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 20th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable position in the 20–22 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving controversies over the derogatory term 'PPT major' and doubts about exam cheating management, but the overall impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranking is 66th (average), with no obvious abnormal signals in application enthusiasm. No historical record of admission gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 20 disciplines were rated A- or above, with Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Management Science and Engineering rated A+, and Optical Engineering, Instrument Science and Technology, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, Architecture, Mechanical Engineering, and Water Conservancy Engineering rated A, showing extremely strong engineering strength, which strongly attracts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly matching Tianjin University's strengths in engineering. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (uncertain), with an estimated 720,000 in the physics category based on historical proportions, a significant increase of about 30% compared to 555,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, not a local university in Henan. In 2025, the enrollment proportion in Henan was about 16.4% (98 out of 598 nationwide), making Henan one of the important source provinces for the university, with a relatively large enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the significant enrollment expansion of 26.8% in 2026, and the substantial increase of about 30% in physics category candidates in Henan Province, a slight upward adjustment is made due to intensified competition from the increase in candidate numbers. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7525, with a range of 7025–8025.
